failures.description: The Executor incorrectly synthesized the search results and omitted a valid matching product (item_id 5312063289, price 195.15) even though it was present in the tool output and satisfied the query condition.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to list all available skateboards with deck material=bamboo priced above $194.56. By step 3, the agent already had all required information from ProductCatalogSearch. The tool output showed four matching items above the threshold: 4293355847 ($200.8), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.6). At step 4, the Executor produced an answer with only three items and omitted item 5312063289. This failure is best categorized as a misinterpretation of tool output because the agent had the correct evidence but synthesized it incorrectly. The later Evaluator approval did not resolve the omission.
